fov-simulator.name: FOV Simulator
fov-simulator.description: Ikumpara ang field of view sa iba't ibang focal length at sensor size

color-scheme-generator.name: Color Scheme Generator
color-scheme-generator.description: Gumawa ng color palette para sa iyong photo shoot

exposure-simulator.name: Simulator ng Exposure Triangle
exposure-simulator.description: Tingnan kung paano nag-uugnay ang aperture, shutter speed, at ISO

dof-simulator.name: Depth-of-Field Simulator
dof-simulator.description: I-visualize kung paano nakakaapekto ang aperture, focal length, at distansya sa background blur

focus-stacking-calculator.name: Focus Stacking Calculator
focus-stacking-calculator.description: Kalkulahin ang tamang focus distances para sa front-to-back sharpness

equivalent-settings-calculator.name: Kalkulador ng Katumbas na Settings
equivalent-settings-calculator.description: Hanapin ang equivalent aperture at focal length sa iba't ibang sensor format

hyperfocal-simulator.name: Simulator ng Hyperfocal Distance
hyperfocal-simulator.description: Alamin kung saan mag-focus para sa maximum sharpness mula foreground hanggang infinity

shutter-speed-visualizer.name: Shutter Speed Visualizer
shutter-speed-visualizer.description: Hanapin ang pinakamabagal na safe shutter speed para sa matatalas na handheld shot

nd-filter-calculator.name: ND Filter Calculator
nd-filter-calculator.description: Kalkulahin ang exposure time gamit ang kahit anong ND filter

star-trail-calculator.name: Star Trail Calculator
star-trail-calculator.description: Kalkulahin ang max exposure para sa matatalas na bituin o magplano ng star trail shot

perspective-compression-simulator.name: Simulator ng Perspective Compression
perspective-compression-simulator.description: Tingnan kung paano nakakaapekto ang focal length sa background compression

white-balance-visualizer.name: White Balance Visualizer
white-balance-visualizer.description: Tingnan kung paano nakakaapekto ang color temperature sa mga litrato mo

sensor-size-comparison.name: Sensor Size Comparison
sensor-size-comparison.description: Biswal na ikumpara ang mga sukat ng camera sensor

frame-studio.name: Frame Studio
frame-studio.description: I-crop, i-frame, at i-compose ang mga litrato gamit ang grid overlays

exif-viewer.name: EXIF Viewer
exif-viewer.description: Tingnan ang EXIF metadata at histogram ng kahit anong litrato — 100% client-side
